DNS name dictionary
MutableMappingNc
NameDictz
A dictionary whose keys are dns.name.Name objects.
    In addition to being like a regular Python dictionary, this
    dictionary can also get the deepest match for a given key.
    )
	max_depth
max_depth_itemsZ

	__class__
0/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/dns/namedict.pyr
NameDict.__init__c

NameDict key must be a name)
isinstance
name
Name
ValueErrorr	
_NameDict__update_max_depth)
valuer
__setitem__?
NameDict.__setitem__c
popr
__delitem__E
NameDict.__delitem__c
iterr	
__iter__N
NameDict.__iter__c
__len__Q
NameDict.__len__c
has_keyT
NameDict.has_keyc
Find the deepest match to *name* in the dictionary.
        The deepest match is the longest name in the dictionary which is
        a superdomain of *name*.  Note that *superdomain* includes matching
        *name* itself.
        *name*, a ``dns.name.Name``, the name to find.
        Returns a ``(key, value)`` where *key* is the deepest
        ``dns.name.Name``, and *value* is the value associated with *key*.
        r
ranger
empty)
depth
get_deepest_matchW
NameDict.get_deepest_match)

__module__
__qualname__
__doc__
	__slots__r
__classcell__r
collections.abcr
dns.namer
